headlines.description: — Pascal Siakam and Tyrese Haliburton played the perfect pair for the Indiana Pacers on Tuesday. Again.
headlines.shortLinkText: Siakam, Haliburton's double-doubles lead Pacers past Bucks 123-115 for 2-0 series lead

events.name: Memphis Grizzlies at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 27 points, and the Oklahoma City Thunder dominated the Memphis Grizzlies 118-99 on Tuesday night to take a 2-0 lead in their first-round playoff series.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 27 as the Thunder roll past Grizzlies 118-99 to take 2-0 series lead

events.name: Minnesota Timberwolves at Los Angeles Lakers

headlines.description: — Rui Hachimura got smacked in the face early in Game 2, and he headed to the Los Angeles Lakers' locker room with a bleeding nose. He was back on the court just one quarter later wearing a mask, which he discarded shortly afterward because it annoyed...
headlines.shortLinkText: Luka scores 31, and the Lakers muscle past the Timberwolves 94-85 to even 1st-round series
